mapper.select: SELECT /*+ index_desc(a pps_customer_image_rec_dt_idx) */ A.IMG_SEQ, A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.IMG_GUBUN, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE', 'IMG_GUBUN', IMG_GUBUN) AS IMG_GUBUN_NM, A.IMG_FILE, A.IMG_PATH, A.STATUS, DECODE(A.STATUS,'A','정상', 'D','삭제', '-') AS STATUS_NM , A.ENC_FLAG, A.MEMO, A.REC_ID, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(A.REC_ID),'') AS REC_ID_NM, TO_CHAR(A.REC_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REC_DT FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.STATUS <> 'D' AND A.REC_DT > TO_DATE('20100101', 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_MNG.MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUB_STATUS ='C' AND SUB_STATUS_DATE <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(sysdate,-6),'YYYYMMDD') )
